history.msg: Captured 5 resources (source=human) — primary: react-lm.github.io, arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629, promptingguide.ai/techniques/react, blog.langchain.dev/react-agent, towardsdatascience.com/react-agent-pattern

Corpus generated — standard depth, diagram=true, ~3380 words. 7 concepts introduced. All 5 primary resources cited. Thought/Action/Observation cycle fully taught. ReAct vs generic planning loop contrast. decision matrix/agent safety named+deferred (14.7/14.8).
Corpus critic PASSED cycle 1 — all 6 checks green. ~3380w standard. All 5 cited. 1 soft: multi-hop question answering unglossed in §7.2 (inline illustration present, non-blocking).
HITL #2 complete — all 9 sections approved as written, depth=standard, expected_delivery=7min, diagram=true. Intent: ReAct cycle diagram (Thought→Action→Observation→loop→Final Answer).

Diagram generated — Mermaid flowchart LR, 8 nodes (5 main cycle + 3 trace), cycle layout with loop-back edge O->T labeled 'need more info' and terminal T->FA labeled 'task complete'. TRACE subgraph anchored via T -.- C1T dotted edge. PNG render requires mmdc execution.

Diagram critic PASSED cycle 1 — all source-level pre-flight checks green: node count 8 (at ceiling, within range), all labels ≤2 words, all concepts map to corpus §5.2/§5.5, no scope creep (no LangChain/agent-safety nodes), title in title: field, loop-back by design not linear_flow_branched. Visual inspection deferred pending mmdc PNG render.

Diagram PNG rendered via npx mmdc — visual inspection PASS. Cycle loop clean: Question(blue)→Thought(purple)→Action(blue)→Observation(blue), loop-back labeled 'need more info', terminal to FinalAnswer(green) labeled 'task complete'. TRACE subgraph (Eiffel Tower Cycle 1) anchored via dotted edge. Labels readable at 1400px.
Reading generated — 1304 words, 7 min. All 5 primary resources cited. Diagram embedded. 6 fixed sections, no frontmatter. multi-hop QA soft finding resolved.
Quiz generated — 6 MCQ, positions [2,0,3,1,2,1], max_share=0.333, bias_defense_applied=true. All 5 LOs covered (LO2 tested twice).
Quiz critic FAIL cycle 1 — meta_gift_desync q5 (sidecar pos=2, gift pos=1), positional_bias max_share=0.500 (pos_1 holds 3/6), length_bias 6/6=1.00 (all correct answers longest). Regenerating.
Quiz critic PASS cycle 2 — positional_bias resolved (max_share=0.333), length_bias resolved (0 violations), meta/gift sync clean. All 5 LOs covered. 2 soft findings (non-blocking).
HITL #3 approved — 1304w reading, 6q quiz (cycle 2), diagram PNG. 2 soft findings accepted.
